name: Kodiak AI, Inc.
business: Kodiak is a leading provider of physical AI, with a focus on AI-powered autonomous vehicle (AV) technology, designed to tackle driving jobs. It serves customers in long-haul trucking, industrial trucking, and defense industries. The Kodiak Driver is a virtual driver that combines AI software with modular hardware.

exposures.sentence: The Kodiak Driver is a unified physical AI system powered by multiple parallel neural nets that continuously learns and adapts across domains for efficient, scalable autonomy.
Kodiak s proprietary SensorPods are mirror-mounted self-contained modules that contain cameras, radars and LiDARs.
The Kodiak Driver is also being utilized in the defense sector, where we believe it can support national security initiatives and critical government applications.

We delivered these driverless trucks to Atlas Energy Solutions ( Atlas ), an oil and gas logistics provider which operates these trucks in the oil-rich Permian Basin of West Texas and Eastern New Mexico.
We serve customers in the long-haul trucking, industrial trucking, and defense industries.
The Kodiak Driver is a unified physical AI system powered by multiple parallel neural nets that continuously learns and adapts across domains for efficient, scalable autonomy.

catalysts.sentence: We intend to complete our long-haul safety case, and commence long-haul driverless operations, by the end of 2026.
